prompt: Square 1:1 editorial wellness photograph in a bright minimalist cream-white studio. A woman in matching cream-colored loungewear in a gentle yoga preparation pose, framed in profile. Soft warm window light. CAMERA-IN-MOTION blur — entire frame carries soft directional smear from a fast diagonal upward camera sweep, nothing tack-sharp; subject is the relative anchor; backgrounds heavily smeared. Near level (~3° tilt). Subtle but clearly present blur. Documentary photojournalism aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
